reviews.title: Knock offs!! Just DON'T DO IT ✅
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:e270e5dd29b72c4c1bdeae3b2a3671e1]] They are dirty with red clay mud. Very very poorly made. For $185 I expect more quality. The material is not properly laid. I am a Nike Shox NZ fanatic. I have over 10 pair and clearly  these are knock offs. The Nike swish is smaller then my pinky finger nail. The shocks are not even so the shoe tilts. I will stick to buying in the store that way I know exactly what I am getting. Ohh let me add they charge you to return items. You have to drive to UPS to drop them off and they charge you a fee. I can not make this up the attached pictures do not lie. Do not buy from this seller. Don't do it!!!! Very disappointed 😞 RETURNING!!!!!

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Venture 5 Running Shoes
description:
The GEL-Venture 5 provides great fit and everyday comfort, with Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System and a rugged outsole ideal for a variety of terrains.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.
Removable Sockliner: A sockliner which can be removed to accommodate a medical orthotic.
Trail Specific Outsole: Reversed lugs provide uphill and downhill traction on all types of terrain.
AHAR Outsole: Acronym for ASICS High Abrasion Rubber. Placed in critical areas of the outsole for exceptional durability.

title: New Balance Women's Fresh Foam Roav V1 Running Shoe
description: The impressive New Balance Fresh Foam Roav running shoes are loaded with built-in technology to make your day more enjoyable. The midsole features Fresh Foam cushioning which provides a feeling of plush comfort while remaining lightweight. NDurance technology makes the rubber outsole more durable so you can wear these shoes whether you're strutting on the sidewalk or jogging off-road. Finally, the Ultra Heel is strategically-designed to hug the back of your foot for a more supportive fit. These workout shoes are designed with your comfort in mind. The neutral cushioned running shoes hug your foot in its natural position to provide a lightly supported ride. Each element of the shoe's design is thoughtfully selected to ensure your feet are happy after daily wear. Made with a synthetic/mesh upper, these athletic shoes offer effortless wear and style. The bootie construction allows for easy on-and-off, while the stretch webbing offers even more comfort and a customized fit. These breathable shoes are here to support you through each stride, lift, squat or stretch. Weather you're exploring the city, hitting the gym or running a quick mile, opt for a shoe that keeps your foot supported while providing a cloud-like ride.
features: 100% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole

Truly Unique: The New Balance Fresh Foam Roav v1 running shoes are the ultimate in casual athletic style. Pairing a bold, attractive look with plush comfort, these cushioned running shoes are in a league of their own.

Fresh Foam Midsole: Feel like you're running or walking in the clouds. The first of three proprietary technologies in this athletic shoe, Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride.

NDurance Outsole: Step up your game without wearing out your favorite running shoes. Ndurance rubber outsole technology provides superior durability in high-wear areas to help get more out of the shoes.

Ultra Heel: These neutral running shoes boast a head-turning heel that performs as well as it looks. The Ultra Heel design hugs the back of the foot for a snug, supportive fit. This unique heel works alongside the bootie upper for all-day comfort.
8mm Drop: These lightweight shoes feature a heel-to-toe drop of approximately 8mm. Due to variances created during development and manufacturing processes, references to 8mm are approximate.

My feet felt great all day wearing them, I never had a problem with them pinching or rubbing my heels. New balance makes some of the best running shoes (in my opinion) and these Roav's did not disappoint. I will be buying additional pairs in other colors.

title: Brooks Men's Ghost 14 Neutral Running Shoe
description: Smooth roads are ahead when you put on the Ghost 14. This award-winning runner favorite now features 100% DNA LOFT in the midsole, for a softer, smoother ride. We’ve also improved the fit so the shoe adjusts even more comfortably to your foot.
features: THIS MEN'S SHOE IS FOR: Runners looking for a smooth ride that won’t distract from the fun of the run. The Ghost 14 offers a simplified midsole construction which creates more seamless transitions. This Brooks Ghost 14 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.

SUPPORT AND CUSHION: The Ghost 14 offers neutral support while providing high energizing cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them! Predecessor: Ghost 13

BALANCED, SOFT CUSHIONING: BioMoGo DNA and DNA LOFT cushioning work together to provide a just-right softness underfoot without losing responsiveness and durability - yet it feels lighter than ever. DNA LOFT now makes up the entire midsole, for a softer, smoother, ride.
SMOOTH, STABLE RIDE: No matter how your foot lands, our Segmented Crash Pad - an integrated system of shock absorbers - will cushion every step and stride for smooth heel-to-toe transitions.
SOFT, SECURE, FIT: More strategic use of the 3D Fit Print upper technology provides structure that moves with the foot.

reviews.title: Brooks has lost a step on wear/quality, but still a very good shoe
reviews.text:
First, Brooks is a top running shoe manufacturer, and I always like buying their products, and they are to be applauded for releasing shoes in widths, which lets you get a shoe that fits, which is essential. If a shoe does not fit properly, then it will be extremely difficult to run (or walk any distance in). The Brooks Glycerin is one model up from the Ghost, that has better cushioning, but is no longer available in a Narrow width, and is more expensive, but the Ghost is a pretty good shoe on its own. I would have given the Ghost 5 stars, but the Ghost 14 is not quite perfect, having two areas where it could be better (and was better previously).

The first picture shows a Ghost 14 (on the left), next to a Ghost 13 (the previous model, on the right), and you can see the Ghost 14 has less tread, so wears out sooner, I would say roughly 50-75 miles of road (asphalt) running. The picture shows both shoes new. The Ghost 13 also was a little more cushioned, but you can offset that some by putting a different insole in the 14, and a lot of runners replace the insoles anyway. The thinner tread means less mileage on the 14s, but still probably as good as most of the competition, just no longer better here.

The second pictures shows the upper collar on a Ghost 14, and the fabric Brooks is using there (not so much on the 13 and earlier models) is nice and soft, but does not hold up. I generally see holes or failures at the top of the lace area, and on some shoes, towards the back collar area. You get a lot of fraying, sometimes holes, which is more an appearance problem than anything that would impact running in them, but means also you cannot wear them casually, at least where someone might see the failures. That may be an aspect that is supply chain related, they used to hold up better, but I have seen the problem on two pair of Ghost 14s, and other manufacturers do a bit better (probably needs a bit more nylon, to hold up longer).

I will say that the Ghost 14 has a narrower tongue at the top, that is shared with the 13 but was new there, and I have not seen it much in other shoes, but actually works very well, so I give kudos to Brooks on that design innovation. There is less chance that during a run the tongue will shift over into the forefoot, at least in a painful way, and you don't have to stop to shift it back.

So overall, particularly at this price point, the Brooks continues to be good value and one of the top shoes to consider, but as with anything, there are a couple of areas that could use further improvement.

title: Klitch Footwear Clip Sports Accessory, Hang Extra Shoes Cleats Boots or Gear on Your Bag. Works on Soccer, Baseball, Basketball, Track, Running Shoes, Flip Flops and More.
description: The Klitch is a footwear clip that allows you to hang extra sneakers or cleats to the outside of your bag. This avoids getting the inside of your bag dirty, smelly, and full. Great for anyone who plays sports, works out, or has an active lifestyle. The Klitch can be used for any type of footwear up to 10 lbs!
features: PATENTED: The Klitch Footwear Clip allows you to carry extra shoes outside your bag allowing your shoes to air out and the contents of your bag to stay clean and fresh!
QUICK & EASY: No more messy and difficult knots to tie or untie. Quickly and easily clamp and clip extra shoes or equipment to your bag with no fuss!
PERFECT FOR SPORTS: Great for soccer cleats, football cleats, baseball spikes, basketball shoes, track shoes, hiking boots, flip-flops and much more!
ON THE GO: Great for traveling, hiking, camping or organizing at home. Hang extra shoes or equipment in your garage, lockers, tents or shoe racks!
CUSTOMER FIRST: The Klitch Footwear Clip includes a 1-year full replacement when purchased through Klitch!

title: Brooks Men’s Launch 9 Neutral Running Shoe
features: Imported

THIS MEN’S SHOE IS FOR: The Launch 9 is for neutral runners who want a dependable, lightweight shoe with DNA cushioning and a highly breathable upper that helps runners go fast on every run. We recommend ordering Brooks running shoes 1/2 to one size larger than your dress shoe.
NEUTRAL SUPPORT: Lightweight, streamlined, with even more BioMoGo DNA cushioning, the Launch 9 offers neutral support to keep you running faster mile after mile.
ENHANCED BREATHABILITY: Reengineered upper features Creel Warp mesh, designed to be extremely light and breathable. Hints of reflectivity on the upper to increase visibility on the road.

LIGHTWEIGHT CUSHIONING: We have added more BioMoGo DNA cushioning to the midsole for an even faster ride without the extra weight. A dynamically responsive ride for days when you are working on your speed.
RESPONSIVE TRANSITIONS: Redesigned midsole increased by 2 mm to provide runners with more responsiveness while the Green Rubber Outsole helps your foot move quickly from heel to toe.

reviews.title: Cheap quality
reviews.text: These are wimpy tennis shoes.  They probably wont' make it a year.  I judge the quality by picking up the shoe and twisting in my hands.  I can easily warp these shoes.  I have some Merrills and I absolutely can't bend them up.

reviews.title: Not the best looking shoe but the most comfortable!
reviews.text: Man my feet hurt. And because I wear the same shoes everyday all day they break down pretty quickly.  These are perfect.  The color isn't my absolute favorite BUT that was the color that was on sale. Besides I'm nearly 50 so I'm not out to impress anyone lol.  They fit my feet perfectly and  there is no better feeling of new shoes when your old shoes broke down! Just enough support.

reviews.title: Great Walking Shoe!
reviews.text: I got these for at home. I like wearing shoes inside. So they need to be clean. I got these, and they are comfy and see like they will last a long time. They should, if I only wear them in my house.

reviews.title: Good fit in a large size
reviews.text: I bought these shoes as a gift for my 25 year old son, who wears a size 16. I know from past experience that New Balance provides a good, consistent fit in their large sizes, and this pair did not disappoint. The fit was great and my son liked the color and style.

title: La Sportiva Mens Jackal Trail Running Shoes
features: Rubber sole
A long-distance trail running shoe for men that offers exceptional cushioning and a wider fit to tackle any off-road adventure
Lightweight and highly durable, the nearly seamless upper keeps you cool and dry while providing reducing hot spots. Sculpted tongue design for an ergonomic fit.
A wider fitting shoe with higher volume to accommodate foot swelling as you put on more miles. 7mm Drop (Stack: Heel: 29mm / Toe: 22mm)

FriXion AT 2.0 rubber outsole with 3 mm lugs for durable, confident grip. Flex-Grooves in the outsole facilitate the perfect flex while dual density rock guard throughout the shoe for ultimate underfoot protection
Rear pull tab assist in fast on/off. Rubber toe cap for rock protection.

reviews.title: Fit too small and too wide.
reviews.text: The shape of the toe box is designed for wider feet with short toes. Add at least a full size over what your usual wear.

title: adidas Girl's Samoa J Running Shoe
description: The samoa was a hugely popular trainer of the '80s, and this season's take treats the shoes to gold foil accents and a bluebird-style tongue. Sized for juniors, they're built with a slightly chunky upper and feature updated tooling for a smooth ride.
features: 100% Leather
Fabric lining
Lace-Up closure
Machine Wash
Brushed synthetic leather upper
Rubber toe bumper
Injected pu midsole for cushioning

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: Thumbs Up

title: New Balance Men's 510 V5 Trail Running Shoe
description: Are you looking for a lightweight, durable and supportive pair of trail running shoes? Then your search ends with the New Balance 510v5. Durability on the outside meets responsive comfort inside for a lightweight running shoe that's as ready as you are for a trail run or whatever else your day has in store. Built with a rugged construction, these New Balance trail shoes offer relentless durability that is suitable for various runs both on- and off-road. The lugged outsole on these comfortable running shoes features AT TREAD technology which provides enhanced traction on the trail or the road, while the lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsole includes both ABZORB technology for impact absorption and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts. For added protection, the reinforced Toe Protect tip helps protect your toes from rocks, roots and debris so you can go off-road with confidence.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Textile
Imported
Rubber sole

Cushioned Running Shoes: ABZORB midsole technology in this runner absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, and the rubber outsole provides strength and durability
Built-In Off-Road Technology: Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris, while AT Tread on the outsole provides versatile traction during both on- and off-road activities
Plush, Cushioned Running Shoes: These runners feature lightweight injection-molded EVA foam midsoles to provide lightweight cushioning and an NB Soft + Supportive Insert for memory comfort that lasts
Built to Last: With an all-over durable construction and an aggressive lugged outsole, these trail running shoes are designed to stand up to all of your outdoor activities
Athletic Aesthetic: With synthetic and mesh uppers that deliver breathability and a top-quality fit, these running shoes also boast a stylish look to fit in with your active lifestyle

reviews.title: Very good quality and comfort
reviews.text: This is my 2nd pair. Great quality and comfort. Nice looking too. True to size. Both pairs have lasted me a long time. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: New Balance shoes fit me the best of all the major brands.
reviews.text: I keep reordering New Balance shoes as previous pairs wear out.

reviews.title: good inexpensive trail shoes
reviews.text: these shoes have an aggressive tread, and for the price are going to be fine. The medium width is actually fairly wide, and my feet have plenty of room.

reviews.title: New Balance Men's 510 V5 Trail Running Shoe
reviews.text: I love New Balance Trail Running Shoes. Have purchased several pairs and they have lasted me for years. Very comfortable and durable kicks.

reviews.title: GREAT BUY
reviews.text: As good a shoe as some of the more expensive brands that I purchased in the past.

title: Racqua Mens Womens Trail Running Shoes Minimalist Shoes Arch Support Barefoot Sport Shoes
features: 90%fabric
Rubber sole
PERFECT MATERIAL: Upper with knitted fabric, and the sole is a unique high-quality non-slip rubber sole with excellent grip, which can give excellent flexibility and comfort.
FOOT SAFETY: The barefoot shoes with good toe protection, can protect feet from sharp rocks and stones, makes you easily cope with the different conditions.
ELASTIC BAND: The pull tap at the heel of shoes can enter quickly and conveniently, protect your feet from slipping, and quickly adjust the tightness of shoes according to the width of your feet.
VARIOUS ACTIVITIES: These minimalist barefoot shoes are suitable for many occasions, such as trail running, camping, training, hiking, jogging, mountaineering, physical exercises and so on.

CUSTOMER SERVICE: We provide exchange and Money Back service if there are any size/quality issues, make your purchase risk free. If you have any problems with the barefoot shoes you bought, please send an email to us at any time. We will try our best to solve it for you.

reviews.title: do not buy!
reviews.text:
If you're looking for shoes that fit as intended, look elsewhere.
The soles are fine, but the upper is rigid fabric. That's not the bad part. The problem is the heel cup is not a heel cup at all. It stops nearly an inch short of where it needs to be and it's flat at the back. It's not a heel cup. It's flat at the back. WTF!
example: size 9 soles; size 8 1/2" upper with half an inch removed at the heel creating immense pain at the heel.

reviews.title: Shoes arrived late deformed and with a snag in top material
reviews.text: Shoes arrived late and deformed sole stuck out about an inch behind shoe. There was also a snag in material on top of shoe very disappointed

reviews.title: Great Comfort
reviews.text: I put orthotics in this shoes. I walked around a amusement park with them and my feet did not hurt. They are very comfortable. I like that I do not need to tie them. I will buy them  again in a different color.

title: 1/4 Inch Track Spikes, 110pcs Stainless Steel Pyramid Shoe Spikes with Spike Wrench for Track and Cross Country,Replacement Spikes for Sprint Sports Short Running Shoes
features: Improve Running Speed and Safety: Running or sports enthusiast, you must not miss this Track Spikes! This pyramid spikes will add the friction between the shoe sole and ground, thus can resist skid and improve your running speed.

Quality Spikes for Track Shoes : Made of quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design, not damage track. Providing long servicing life.These spikes are suitable for all athletic tracks, and field or cross country surfaces,help you get better grades.

Small Spikes Size : Perfect size 1/4"extra track spikes, full length is 0.5”(12.8mm), pyramid needle design, spike wrench size 2"*1.8". Easy to match with most of the track shoes, bring you superior traction, strength and durability
Widely Usage : The spikes provide optimal grip for track and field or dry terrain in cross-country, ideal for track sprints, long jump, running, outdoor sports activities

Enough Quantity Spikes : Package include 110 pieces pyramid track spikes with 1 pieces spike wrench and 1 pieces transparent storage box, easy to carry and convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.

reviews.title: Great shoes
reviews.text: Love these shoes for my toddler. They fit great, always look clean, and are easily washed. They do, however, tie and not velcro. They still look great after several months of everyday wear.

title: Mens Running Shoes Slip-on Walking Sneakers Lightweight Breathable Casual Soft Sole Trainers
features: Mesh
MD sole

These are great everyday shoes when on your feet all day.Slides on like a sock,comfortable and very lightweight, it does not even feel like wearing shoes and as someone who prefers to be barefoot, it is nice.
Mesh,breathable and lightweight knitted upper.Memory foam Cushioning insole.

Low-top design and easy pull on and take off.The latest in mesh technology features an elastic design that intertwines with the knitted upper,without the feeling of binding,without stuffy and helping your foot feel secure,comfortable as you all day.
Flexible and non-slip outsole: A softer foam cushions your foot,the outsole with irregular pattern adds traction and durability, and the high-quality materials make the shoes bend when moving.
Padded collar and tongue gives you a secure, ankle-conforming fit and prevent grinding feet.
